summary: Bug fix verification: get_user_total_redeemed function now correctly calculates total_redeemed by checking all collection names and field variations. Test user shows 700.0 PRC used (was showing 0).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified successfully. The get_user_total_redeemed function now correctly reads PRC amounts from all relevant collections (bill_payment_requests, bank_redeem_requests, redeem_requests, gift_voucher_requests, transactions) and handles all field variations (amount_prc, total_prc_deducted, prc_used, prc_deducted, prc_amount). Test user 6c96a6cc-08a2-442c-8e2d-f1fb6f18aa21 now shows total_redeemed=700.0 (previously was 0). The transactions collection query now correctly uses $or: [{user_id}, {uid}] to match both field names.

bug_fix_verified.original_issue: Used column in admin members page showing 0 for all users
root_cause: Missing amount_prc field check (used in transactions)
transactions query was using user_id instead of uid
bug_fix_verified.fix_applied: Added all missing collections and field variations to get_user_total_redeemed function
